definitions.gloss: don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)

standard.text: この言葉の定義は「don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」である。
「don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」という意味で使われることが多い。
don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」という概念は重要だ。
その出来事は「don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」の良い例だ。
「don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」という価値観が大切だ。
don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」という考え方は昔から存在する。
「don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」というのは難しい概念だ。
don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」を理解することは重要である。
「don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」という側面から見ると異なる。
don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」という表現は適切だ。
「don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」の意味で使用される。
don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」という判断は妥当だ。
「don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」という概念を日本語で表す。
don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」という視点は有効である。
「don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」の例は多く見られる。
don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」という定義で理解している。
「don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」という意味が込められている。
don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」という考え方に共感する。
「don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」という要素は不可欠だ。
don't push, don't run, don't talk, don't go back (emergency drill instruction)」というテーマで議論した。
